title: First Person Nom
description: A Simple mod that brings the first person eating from  more realistic eating in first person, originally was a commission before my client refused to pay
body:
# First Person Nom

This weeks one mod a week mantra, adds a more realistic and immersive eating experience in Minecraft's first-person perspective. Initially, this project was a custom commission, but after my client decided not to proceed with the payment 😡.

I have decided to release it for my mod for week 5

Key Features:

Realistic Eating Animations: 
i modified the position of the arm to simulate the act of eating. Players can visually see themselves consuming food.


Thats it lol.

Join the discord:
https://discord.com/faPd8MQ3Ke
